query:
SELECT id, number, numberDisplay, provider, customerName, providerServiceCode, notes, status, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId
FROM phone_numbers
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode'
  AND (customerName LIKE '%Action Smart%' OR customerName LIKE '%Envest%')
ORDER BY customerName, number;
command:
